summary.business_type: Italian sports news publisher (Next.js + Sanity on Vercel)
top_findings: news-sitemap.xml is empty (zero URLs) — forfeits Google News/Top Stories discovery
Homepage and 6 static pages have no <h1>
9 articles duplicated under two category paths; case-variant URLs return 200 without canonical
Betting content has no responsible-gambling signals (18+/ADM)
quick_wins: Return real 404 status from not-found pages
Add <h1> to homepage and static pages
Remove /blog redirect from sitemap; add 13 missing articles
Fix doubled '| Trm Sport | Trm Sport' title suffix

findings.title: Empty news sitemap
findings.description: news-sitemap.xml declared in robots.txt returns an empty <urlset> despite daily article publishing
findings.recommendation: Generate from articles published in last 48h with news:news tags

findings.title: Soft 404s
findings.description: Non-existent URLs (e.g. /pagina-che-non-esiste-xyz, /CALCIO) return HTTP 200 with a noindex 404 template
findings.recommendation: Return status 404 via notFound() when Sanity fetch is null

findings.title: 13 articles missing from sitemap.xml
findings.description: Published, internally-linked, self-canonical articles absent from the sitemap
findings.recommendation: Fix the sitemap route's GROQ filter

findings.title: Duplicate article paths across categories
findings.description: 9 slugs resolve 200 under two category prefixes; internal links target non-canonical variants
findings.recommendation: 301 non-canonical paths; link only canonical category

findings.title: Case-variant URLs indexable
findings.description: Lowercase slug variants return 200 with NO canonical tag
findings.recommendation: Middleware 301 to canonical slug; lowercase slugs going forward

findings.title: /blog redirect in sitemap
findings.description: sitemap.xml lists /blog which 308-redirects to /

findings.title: non-www redirect is 307
findings.description: https://trmsport.com/ -> 307 temporary redirect to www

findings.title: No edge caching
findings.description: Cache-Control private/no-store; x-vercel-cache MISS on every request
findings.recommendation: ISR with revalidate for home/category pages

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: Unique meta descriptions on all pages

findings.title: 7 pages missing H1 incl. homepage
findings.description: /, /chi-siamo, /chi-siamo-2, /contatti, /correzioni, /linea-editoriale, /redazione

findings.title: 141/162 titles over 60 chars
findings.description: Titles truncate in SERPs; template concatenates headline + category + brand

findings.title: Doubled brand suffix
findings.description: '… | TRM Sport | Trm Sport' on 404 and chi-siamo-2

findings.title: 3 legal pages share a generic title
findings.description: cookie-policy, privacy-policy, termini-di-servizio all use the site-default title

findings.title: Keyword-list mixed-case slugs
findings.description: e.g. calciomercato-Inter-Marotta-Ausilio-Lautaro-Onana-Chivu

findings.title: No responsible-gambling signals in betting section
findings.description: No 18+, gioco responsabile, or ADM references on betting articles (YMYL)
findings.recommendation: Standing disclaimer block in betting layout

findings.title: Duplicate About pages
findings.description: /chi-siamo (331w) and orphaned /chi-siamo-2 (205w, 46% overlap)

findings.title: Thin articles
findings.description: Articles under 300 words, e.g. /rugby/rugby-urc-zebre-parma-semifinale (251w)

findings.title: Orphan pages
findings.description: /chi-siamo-2 and /legal/termini-di-servizio have zero internal links

findings.title: Thin trust pages
findings.description: correzioni 109w, contatti 114w, redazione 175w
findings.recommendation: Expand with concrete policies and contacts

categories.name: Schema
what_works: NewsArticle passes Google Rich Results requirements

findings.title: isAccessibleForFree is null
findings.description: Property emitted as null on NewsArticle

findings.title: SearchAction target unverified
findings.description: Points to /?q={search_term_string}; unclear it renders results
findings.recommendation: Point at real search route or verify

findings.title: Brand name inconsistency in schema
findings.description: WebSite name 'TRM SPORT' vs publisher 'TRM Sport'

findings.title: 349KB inline RSC flight data on homepage
findings.description: 62% of the 567KB homepage document is serialized Next.js flight data
findings.recommendation: Trim fields serialized per article card

findings.title: No edge-cache hits
findings.description: Every request is an SSR MISS

categories.name: AI Readiness
what_works: llms.txt present with curated category map

findings.title: Inconsistent AI-crawler policy
findings.description: Blocks CCBot/ClaudeBot/Meta-ExternalAgent but allows GPTBot/PerplexityBot; ships llms.txt while blocking ClaudeBot

findings.title: llms.txt uses non-www URLs
findings.description: Links 307-redirect to www

findings.title: AVIF not served
findings.description: Heroes are ~90KB WebP at w=1200

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Add h1 to homepage + static pages

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact Improvements
items: Shorten titles + fix doubled brand suffix

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Expand thin articles and trust pages
